'''t'ub'''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sun|sun]] (archaic/proto)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t'-b'-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sun|sun]] (archaic/proto)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || t'ab'ïf?ïfth || t'ab'ïf?ïfj || t'ab'ïf?ïfsh || t'ab'ïf?ïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || t'ab'ïfb'ïf?ïfth || t'ab'ïfb'ïf?ïfj || t'ab'ïfb'ïf?ïfsh || t'ab'ïfb'ïf?ïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || t'ab'ïf?ïfïf || t'ab'ïf?ïfïf || t'ab'ïf?ïfïf || t'ab'ïf?ïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || t'ab'ïf?ïfth || t'ab'ïf?ïfj || t'ab'ïf?ïfsh || t'ab'ïf?ïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfl || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfl || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfl || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfïf || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfïf || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfïf || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfn || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfn || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfn || t'ab'ïf?ïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || t'ab'ïf?ïfïforo || t'ab'ïf?ïfïforo || t'ab'ïf?ïfïforo || t'ab'ïf?ïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|086b4c8}}
